step.name: scaffold-feature-dirs
step.action: Create internal/<feature>/handler.go, service.go, repo.go (and corresponding _test.go). Stub package declarations.

step.name: declare-interfaces-at-service
step.action: In service.go, declare interfaces for required dependencies (repo, external client). Concrete types declared in repo.go.

step.name: implement-repository
step.action: Implement repo with SQL/ORM. Each method takes/returns domain structs (no HTTP types). Add integration tests with dockertest or testcontainers.

step.name: implement-service
step.action: Service methods orchestrate repo + business logic + side effects. Tests use mocked repo. No HTTP imports.

step.name: wire-handler
step.action: Handler decodes request, calls service.X(ctx, primitives), encodes response. Tests use httptest with mocked service.
step.decision-gate: If handler grows past ~50 lines of non-decode/encode logic, push work down to service.
